steps.description: Click the "Declarative Agent" option in the "New Project" dialog within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension for Visual Studio Code.
Click the "No Action" option in the "Add an action to your declarative agent" dropdown within the "Create Declarative Agent" dialog in Microsoft Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Start with a New API" option in the "Create an Action" dropdown within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension panel in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "None" option in the "Select an authentication type" dropdown menu within the "Authentication Type" dialog of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "JavaScript" option in the "Programming Language" dropdown menu at the top of the Visual Studio Code interface.
Click the "Default folder /home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects" option in the Workspace Folder selection dropdown in Visual Studio Code.
